key_dependencies_reasoning: cui-java-tools and cui-http for core utilities and HTTP, jakarta.json for JSON processing, dsl-json for high-perf JSON, jspecify for null-safety

de.cuioss.sheriff.oauth.core.description: Main entry point providing TokenValidator for creating and validating tokens, IssuerConfig for issuer setup, and ParserConfig for parsing configuration.

de.cuioss.sheriff.oauth.core.domain.description: Contains domain models for tokens (AccessToken, IdToken, RefreshToken), claims, validation contexts, and authorization results.

de.cuioss.sheriff.oauth.core.jwks.description: Handles JWKS (JSON Web Key Set) operations including key parsing, HTTP fetching, caching, and rotation support.

de.cuioss.sheriff.oauth.core.pipeline.description: Implements the validation pipeline with pluggable validators for signature verification, claim validation, and expiration checking.

purpose_reasoning: packaging=jar, no runtime deps, no main class, used as compile dependency
responsibility: Provides the core JWT token validation library with multi-issuer support, JWKS key management, validation pipelines, and domain models for tokens, claims, and validation contexts.
responsibility_reasoning: From package-info.java and module structure with 19 packages covering pipeline, jwks, domain, cache
skills_by_profile_reasoning: Core library uses Lombok, JSpecify null-safety, CUI logging. Removed java-cdi (no CDI annotations). Added CUI-specific skills for logging and testing.
